---
title: "Splitting And Creating A Document With Selected Pages"
---

You can select a number of pages and split a document to create a new document with the selected pages.

To split selected pages of a document:

1.  On the relevant document area, do one of the following:
-
To select a single page, click the thumbnail image of the page from which you want to create a new document and select the check box in the upper-left corner.

-
To select multiple pages, click the thumbnail image and select the check box in the upper-left corner of each thumbnail image. A tick appears on the selected pages.

2.  In the upper-right corner of the document area, click the vertical ellipsis icon.   ![](data:image/gif;base64,)
A drop-down menu is displayed.

3.  Click Split selected pages or press Alt + L. A new document is created with the selected pages.
